How It Works

Three steps to clarity on your merchant cash advance.

1

Upload

Drop your MCA contract (PDF or photo). Takes 10 seconds.

2

AI Analyzes

Our system extracts every term, calculates your real APR, and checks for red flags.

3

See Your Report

Plain English breakdown of what's in your contract. No jargon, no cost.

Free. Always.
Private. We don't store your contract.
No account needed.
Facts only. No legal advice.

2,400+

Contracts analyzed

Trusted by small business owners to understand their MCA terms.

$4.2M+

In hidden fees exposed

Our analysis has helped borrowers see the true cost of their advances.

Check Your Contract Now

PDF, JPG, or PNG. Max 20MB. Analysis is free and private.

Accepted: PDF, JPG, PNG. Max 20MB.

Most MCA borrowers don't know their real APR.

The factor rate in your contract hides the true annual cost. A 1.35 factor rate on a 6-month advance is over 100% APR. Our tool does the math so you don't have to.
